MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT EMMANUEL ENYINWA DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.
Appearances: Miguel Gonzalez (510.235.5716) plaintiff and responding party appearing in propria persona with translator Lynn; Emmanuel Enyinwa (956.6100) defendant and moving party appearing in propria persona.
Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: defendant's demurrer is overruled. Defendant must file his answer within 15 days. The court directed Mr. Enyinwa to submit a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
